s: In 1978, Randy Stein suited up for MIL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.330, WHIP 1.610, SO 42, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIL -> SEA).

Changed teams after the previous season (SEA -> CHC).
